headline: Figma and Wix shares tumble as Anthropic targets AI web design market
summary: Investing.com -- Figma (NYSE:FIG) fell 6% Tuesday after The Information reported that Anthropic is preparing to launch an AI-powered tool for designing websites and presentations, potentially as soon as this week.
